clips.title: The Bluff
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, tense grade. A dim high-stakes poker room, a green felt table, stacks of chips, cigar haze. A person holds their cards with a tense, unreadable stare, jaw tight, eyes locked forward, sweat at the brow. A person in a sharp suit. Warm low light, smoky haze, tense expression, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Clock
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, suspense grade. A dim room, a digital countdown glowing red nearby. A person watches the timer with intense tension, breath held, brow furrowed, hands frozen mid-air. A person in technical work clothes. Cold light with red glow, deep shadow, tense expression, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Standoff
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, tense grade. A dim warehouse, cold shafts of light through high windows, dust in the air. A person stands rigid in a tense standoff, muscles coiled, staring hard, hands slightly raised. A person in a rugged jacket. Cold hard light, deep shadow, tense expression, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Wait
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, anxious grade. A sterile hospital waiting room, cold fluorescent light, empty chairs. A person sits gripping the arms of the chair, tense and anxious, leg bouncing, staring at a door. A person in casual clothes. Cold fluorescent light, flat tones, tense expression, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Door
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, suspense grade. A dim apartment, a person pressed close to a door, listening. Their face is tense with concentration and dread, ear near the wood, hand hovering over the handle. A person in home clothes. Warm dim light, hard shadow, tense expression, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Alarm
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, urgent grade. A dim control room, red warning lights flashing across banks of equipment. A person freezes mid-action, tense and alert as an alarm blares, eyes snapping to a screen. A person in a technical jumpsuit. Cold light with red flash, tense expression, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.
